title: Secret Rooms Found in Ancient Pyramid!
summary: Scientists found two hidden empty spaces inside the Menkaure pyramid in Egypt. The pyramid is one of the famous pyramids at Giza. For a long time, people thought there might be a secret entrance on the east side. The scientists used special tools like radar and ultrasound to look inside the pyramid without breaking it. They found two empty rooms behind the stone wall. These rooms might be a secret entrance that no one knew about. The discovery is exciting because it helps us learn more about how the ancient Egyptians built the pyramids. The scientists are from universities in Egypt and Germany. They worked together on a project called ScanPyramids. This is not the first time they found something hidden. In 2023, they found a secret corridor in another pyramid. Now they hope to find out more about these hidden rooms.

keywords.explanation: a huge stone building that ancient Egyptians built as a tomb for their kings
a tool that uses radio waves to find things that are hidden
a tool that uses sound waves to see inside things

background_read: The pyramids of Giza are very old buildings in Egypt. They were built over 4,000 years ago. The largest pyramid is called the Great Pyramid of Khufu. The Menkaure pyramid is the third largest. Scientists use special tools to look inside pyramids without breaking them. This helps them learn about how the pyramids were built and what is inside.
Article_Structure: WHO: Scientists from Cairo University and Technical University of Munich.
WHAT: Found two hidden empty spaces inside the Menkaure pyramid.
WHERE: On the east side of the Menkaure pyramid at Giza, Egypt.
WHY: To find a possible secret entrance and learn more about the pyramid.

perspectives.description: The finding shows new technology can reveal hidden parts of ancient structures.
It helps us understand how ancient Egyptians built and used the pyramids.
